title: coupon — compliance evidence
description: Coupon module is financial-record-adjacent (every redemption is a discount that reduced invoice-line revenue — SOX + tax audit relevant) + PII-adjacent (customer_id + redeemed_by_user_id captured on every redemption) + advertising-adjacent (feeds marketing conversion events for referral + campaign coupons) + rate-limit-relevant (preview endpoint protected against brute-force code enumeration). GDPR (Art. 5, 6, 17), CAN-SPAM Act (promotional coupon emails), US tax law (7y financial record), SOX 404 (internal controls), SOC 2 CC6.3.

controls.evidence: Every coupon redemption records the customer + actor + timestamp — full auditability. Terms of the discount frozen in discount_snapshot at redemption time — no post-hoc mutation of what the customer received.

CouponRedemption captures only what the discount computation needs: customer identity, target identity, source amount, currency. No incidental PII beyond that. Coupon rows carry NO customer identity at all — the coupon is a config artifact, not a user artifact.
7-year retention window justified by tax + SOX financial-record obligations. Enterprise 10-year extension for regulated tenants. Automated purge via PurgeExpiredCouponsJob.
Coupon redemption is contractual — the tenant offers the discount, the customer accepts by redeeming. Coupon terms + applicability constitute the contract.

UserErased (as customer on redemptions) triggers RedactCouponRedemptionsOnUserErasure — 90 days post-erasure, redact customer_id + customer_type. Row survives for the 7-year financial audit trail (financial-obligation carve-out per Art. 17 §3(b)).

No fully-automated decisions with legal/significant effect. Coupon validation is rule-based (applicability + usage_cap + per_customer_limit + minimum-order) — all human-authored config, not automated profiling. Refusal responses always include an actionable reason code + support-contact CTA.

discount_snapshot is IMMUTABLE. discount_type + discount_amount become immutable once even one redemption commits. Rate-limit middleware prevents brute-force code enumeration. Confidential financial fields (discount_amount, usage_cap, minimum_order_amount) require coupons.view-financials permission.

Every CouponExpiredNotification + weekly report notification email carries an unsubscribe link. CouponRedeemedNotification is opt-in only (settings.notify_on_every_redemption default off). CouponClawbackNotification is transactional (cannot-opt-out per US CAN-SPAM 4(a)(3)(a) — required for the reversal disclosure).
Every promotional coupon email footer includes the tenant's registered business address (populated from tenant.legal_address_json).

Notification email subjects are fixed shape: 'Your coupon reward is on the way' / 'Coupon usage cap reached' / 'Your discount has been reversed' — no clickbait / misleading language. Templates validated on tenant customisation via NotificationsService's template linter.

controls.principle: traceable audit trail of every discount applied to revenue
controls.evidence: Every CouponRedemption carries: source_amount_cents, discount_amount_cents, final_amount_cents, source_currency + a frozen discount_snapshot. Cross-referenced with the parent Invoice/Membership/Transaction for full revenue-recognition audit. Retained 7 years.

controls.principle: record of discount applied per jurisdiction
controls.evidence: The parent invoice-line carries the jurisdiction via finance::tax::TaxCalculation. Coupon module records the discount that reduced the taxable base; tax module records the tax on the post-discount amount. The two are cross-referenced for sales tax audit.

controls.criterion: SOX 404 — internal controls over financial reporting
controls.principle: segregation of duties + audit trail on discount authorization
controls.evidence: Coupon.create requires marketing/admin/owner role. CouponRedemption.reverse requires admin/owner only (financial reversal — separated from create authority). Every write + reversal is Auditable (7-year retention). Terms are immutable post-first-redemption (COUPON_TERMS_LOCKED).

Coupon CRUD requires marketing/admin/owner. Redemption reversal requires admin/owner. Confidential financial fields (discount_amount, usage_cap) require coupons.view-financials permission. Platform-plane cross-tenant read requires super_admin/ops/support role.
All routes are TLS-only + require auth:sanctum (tenant) or auth:platform_admin (platform). Coupon.rate_limit middleware protects preview/validate endpoints from brute-force enumeration.
academorix.coupon.atomicity.failures_total = 0 target. academorix.coupon.usage_count.drift_ratio = 0 target. Every CouponClawbackRequested + CouponClawbackCompleted fires audit rows + notifications.

Row-lock atomic redemption prevents double-spend races. Composite unique index on redemptions prevents duplicate rows. usage_cap + per_customer_limit prevent overuse. Reconciler job (ReconcileUsageCountJob) catches counter drift. Every clawback path notifies Finance module for the credit reversal.

Coupon + CouponRedemption rows are Auditable (7-year retention). Every state transition on Coupon (is_active, valid_until, usage_count, applicable_plan_ids) + every reversal on CouponRedemption is logged. Audit-log entries survive cascade deletes.

Two-guard permission surface (sanctum + platform_admin). Confidential financial fields (discount_amount, usage_cap) restricted to admin+support+owner. Financial reversal (redemption reverse) restricted to admin+owner. Bulk-issue restricted to Medium+ tier via entitlement + marketing/admin/owner permission.
The discount-type-chip + coupon-status-badge use HeroUI's design tokens which meet AA contrast by default. Discount type colours never rely on colour alone — each carries a text label.
Bulk-issue wizard + reverse-redemption modal are fully keyboard-navigable per HeroUI ComboBox + Modal + Form semantics.

Every observer refusal returns a specific error code (COUPON_CAPTURE_NOT_ENTITLED, COUPON_SLOT_QUOTA_EXCEEDED, etc.) + user-facing message. Redemption refusal responses include actionable reason + support-contact CTA when appropriate.
